沐秋一觉醒来，竟发现自己重生末世，而他沉睡了两年的身体竟在他无意识间进化成了一只具有吞噬异能的尸皇！
这时，脑海中一道声音传来：“恭喜宿主绑定大千世界签到系统”
“宿主已到达签到地点，首次奖励圣主魔气，下一次签到地点.....”

tion":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1638612156,"author_reply_time":1638612209,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133777918807163683","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书不错，也不知道平分为什么这么低，可能有些善良的路人，看不足半小时就下评价了吧，不错的丧尸文，题材新颖，比那些带系统的其他主角来说，不圣母，也不乱开后宫，有些地方还值得改进，比如十二符咒是按个人能力来算的，也没有那么没用吧。还有楪祈写着写着就没戏了，全文后面也没提，作者忘记了吗？作者加油啊，一天一更根本不够看，千年夜土算是高潮了，期待后面的剧情","text_exts":[{"e":95,"s":91,"text":"十二符咒","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%81%E4%BA%8C%E7%AC%A6%E5%92%92&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774128577CFC9EBDB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227133777918807163683%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227012573687027076137%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%81%E4%BA%8C%E7%AC%A6%E5%92%92%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660962165,"group_id":"7012573687027076137","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"正在努力学习","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw7N2JiT96OtCkUhsYfWX+A5mlDIKKlGdlX1KbeXdYge","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e93b32efec7743aaa9b4d7c76fc35d8f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702230&x-signature=G7fXRUxzNph2oJmaKDENauttyU8%3D","user_id":"3347356120528888","user_name":"努力奋斗的阎一"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3347356120528888","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7012573687027076137","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世】+【无敌】
